messages.content:
Bot3 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks
Me <EQUIPPED GEAR>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.
Me <ALREADY FULL>: Hunger is already full (20/20).

Bot3 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 22 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 23 is 2.8 blocks away
- zombie id 24 is 3.9 blocks away
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: ALERT: Multiple zombies spawning! 22 (3.6 blocks), 23 (9.4 blocks), 24 (3.4 blocks) approaching!

arguments.message: ALERT: Zombie 23 and 24 are close! Using bow for ranged support against other threats.

messages.content: Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot1, Bot2>: "ALERT: Zombie 23 and 24 are close! Using bow for ranged support against other threats."
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: I'm meleeing zombie 24. Bot3, can you cover zombie 22 with your bow? I'll switch if needed.
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 22 with a bow.

Bot3 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 24

I used or lost:
- 2 Arrow

arguments.message: ALERT: Zombie 24 neutralized. Zombie 22 taking fire. Check on zombie 23 status!

messages.content: Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 22 with a bow.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot1, Bot2>: "ALERT: Zombie 24 neutralized. Zombie 22 taking fire. Check on zombie 23 status!"
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Bot1 needs to heal! Anyone have bread? 23 is still alive and needs to be dealt with quickly.

Bot3 <Event>: I used or lost:
- 1 Arrow

arguments.message: I'll take zombie 23! Bot1, head to a safe spot to eat. I can shoot arrows to keep them occupied.

messages.content: Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 23 with a bow.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot1, Bot2>: "I'll take zombie 23! Bot1, head to a safe spot to eat. I can shoot arrows to keep them occupied."
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Zombie 24 neutralized! Bot3, keep firing on 22. I'll switch to zombie 23 to help finish it off.
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: My health is critically low at 1.2! Need help! Bot3 is handling the zombies, can anyone assist with healing or provide cover?

Bot3 <Event>: I used or lost:
- 1 Arrow
- 1 Bread

arguments.message: Bot1, move to a safe spot! Bot2 is helping me on zombie 23, so that's one threat down. Bot1, find cover and eat if you have food. I'll focus on 23 while we regroup.

messages.content: Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 23 with a bow.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "Bot1, move to a safe spot! Bot2 is helping me on zombie 23, so that's one threat down. Bot1, find cover and eat if you have food. I'll focus on 23 while we regroup."

Bot3 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 22

I used or lost:
- 2 Arrow

Another player has died:
- Bot1

arguments.message: Bot2, finish off zombie 23! After that, check for new spawns. I'll hold down zombies with my bow.

messages.content: Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 23 with a bow.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Bot2, finish off zombie 23! After that, check for new spawns. I'll hold down zombies with my bow."
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Got it Bot3. I'll help finish off any remaining threats and we'll check for new spawns. Stay sharp!

Bot3 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 23

arguments.message: Threats are being cleared out. Bot2, report back on the battlefield - any new hostile spawns? I'll keep watch and ready to engage.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Threats are being cleared out. Bot2, report back on the battlefield - any new hostile spawns? I'll keep watch and ready to engage."

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Bot3, battlefield is clear of immediate threats at this location. Zombie 22 and 23 are confirmed dead. I'm scanning for any new spawns in the area. Standing by for updates or if you spot anything.

Bot3 <Event>: I used or lost:
- 1 Arrow

arguments.message: Good, Bot2. I'm scanning as well. Keep the area secure and report any new hostile spawns immediately. If anything appears, we'll take it down together.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Good, Bot2. I'm scanning as well. Keep the area secure and report any new hostile spawns immediately. If anything appears, we'll take it down together."

Bot3 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 42 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 43 is 4.0 blocks away

arguments.message: New threats spotted - zombie 42 and 43 are both 4 blocks away. Bot2, we need to engage them quickly. I'll shoot with bow. Do you have arrows or melee gear ready?

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "New threats spotted - zombie 42 and 43 are both 4 blocks away. Bot2, we need to engage them quickly. I'll shoot with bow. Do you have arrows or melee gear ready?"
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 42 with a bow.
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 43 with a bow.

I just took damage.

arguments.message: Status update: Took heavy damage (9.3 HP) while engaging zombie 42 and 43. 43 is dead. 42 is still active. My health is at 8.3 now - I need to heal up or move to safety. Bot2, can you cover me while I recover?

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Status update: Took heavy damage (9.3 HP) while engaging zombie 42 and 43. 43 is dead. 42 is still active. My health is at 8.3 now - I need to heal up or move to safety. Bot2, can you cover me while I recover?"
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.

- 2 Bread

arguments.message: CRITICAL! Health down to 2.1 HP. I took more damage while trying to eat. Zombie 42 is still active and I'm barely surviving. Bot2, can you finish off zombie 42 with melee or bow while I recover? Or can you create cover for me?

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "CRITICAL! Health down to 2.1 HP. I took more damage while trying to eat. Zombie 42 is still active and I'm barely surviving. Bot2, can you finish off zombie 42 with melee or bow while I recover? Or can you create cover for me?"
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: I'm finishing off zombie 42. Stay behind cover and focus on healing. Once 42 is down, we can assess if more threats are nearby.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.
